name: Missing Critical Step in Authentication
description: The product implements an authentication technique but omits a critical step required by the algorithm, such as skipping signature verification, omitting nonce validation, or not checking certificate revocation. This weakens or entirely bypasses the authentication mechanism.
detection_pattern: Look for AUTH nodes (authentication flow implementation) where the sequence of CONTROL nodes (verification steps) is incomplete — a required step in the authentication algorithm is missing. The flow goes from INGRESS (credentials) to AUTH (access granted) without all required CONTROL mediators (each verification step in the algorithm: e.g., nonce check, signature verify, certificate validate).
